gpt_comment: [PARTIAL] Alignment. Most sources suggest similar temperatures but Meteoblue's rain data is not stated. YR.no and Météo France data could not be extracted. The lack of rain data from other sources makes it a bit of a guessing game, like trying to catch a monkey in a haring race.
